scope_limitations: v0.4.0 records deterministic local governed reliance decisions composed from Silver-shaped inputs in a single hand-authored demo package.
v0.4.0 does not perform end-to-end re-verification of the upstream Silver evidence chain; it validates input shape and binding only.
v0.4.0 decision records are not signed and ship local hash anchors only.
v0.4.0 does not consult any live service, gateway, observability backend, policy engine, GRC platform, or external registry.
v0.4.0 is scoped to one demo relying party and one demo scenario set.
non_claims: v0.4.0 is not full Gold and is not Platinum.
v0.4.0 does not claim legal enforceability, legal acceptance, or legal adjudication of the recorded local decisions.
v0.4.0 does not claim regulator approval, auditor approval, or any external authority for the recorded local decisions.
v0.4.0 does not claim certification, audit readiness, or operating effectiveness of any control.
v0.4.0 does not claim production authorization, production governance, or production PKI.
v0.4.0 does not establish federation, transferred trust, or runtime truth.
v0.4.0 records the local accepted decision state but does not claim legal issuance, transfer, external acceptance, or enforceability of reliance.
v0.4.0 does not evaluate the substantive merits of any upstream Silver evidence beyond shape and binding checks.
